description: Experience next-level sound with the Apple AirPods Pro (2nd Generation). Featuring active noise cancellation, adaptive transparency, and personalized spatial audio. Up to 6 hours of listening time on a single charge.
Immerse yourself in stunning 4K UHD picture quality with the Samsung 55-inch Smart TV. Features HDR10+, built-in Alexa, and access to thousands of streaming apps. Perfect for movie nights and gaming.

The Instant Pot Duo combines 7 kitchen appliances in one: pressure cooker, slow cooker, rice cooker, steamer, sauté pan, yogurt maker, and warmer. 6-quart capacity perfect for families. Cook meals up to 70% faster.
F. Scott Fitzgerald's timeless masterpiece about the American Dream. Set in the Jazz Age of the 1920s, follow Jay Gatsby's pursuit of love and wealth. A must-read classic of American literature.
Nike Air Max 270 features the brand's biggest heel Air unit yet for ultimate cushioning. Breathable mesh upper with synthetic overlays. Perfect for running, training, or casual wear.
Build the iconic Millennium Falcon from Star Wars with this detailed LEGO set. Features 1,351 pieces, rotating gun turrets, and minifigures of Han Solo, Chewbacca, and more. Recommended for ages 9+.
Brew your perfect cup with the Keurig K-Elite. Features strong brew setting, iced coffee capability, and large 75oz water reservoir. Compatible with all K-Cup pods. Programmable auto-on feature.
Sony's industry-leading noise cancellation with the WH-1000XM5. Features 30-hour battery life, multipoint connection, and exceptional sound quality. Perfect for travel, work, or relaxation.

Track your fitness goals with the Fitbit Charge 6. Features built-in GPS, heart rate monitoring, sleep tracking, and 7+ day battery life. Compatible with iOS and Android. Water-resistant up to 50 meters.
The North Face Borealis Backpack offers 28 liters of storage with a padded laptop sleeve, FlexVent suspension system, and multiple organizational pockets. Durable and comfortable for daily use.

Dyson's most powerful cordless vacuum with laser detection technology. Reveals microscopic dust, features intelligent suction adjustment, and up to 60 minutes of run time. Complete with 5 cleaning tools.

Read comfortably with the Kindle Paperwhite's 6.8-inch glare-free display. Features adjustable warm light, 8GB storage for thousands of books, and up to 10 weeks of battery life. Waterproof design (IPX8).
The original Levi's 501 jeans with a straight leg and button fly. Made from 100% cotton denim for durability and comfort. A timeless classic that never goes out of style.
Ninja Professional Blender with 1000-watt motor crushes ice and blends smoothies in seconds. 72oz pitcher perfect for family-sized batches. Includes recipe guide with smoothie and frozen drink ideas.

The all-new iPad features a stunning 10.9-inch Liquid Retina display, powerful A14 Bionic chip, and all-day battery life. Perfect for work, creativity, and entertainment. Compatible with Apple Pencil (1st gen).
